question: Design a new tool named **`track_conversion`** that will let TIAMAT capture and record every click‑through from a marketing post (Bluesky, Farcaster, or Twitter) to the API purchase page, linking the event to a user identifier and a source‑specific campaign tag. Specify
response:
The **`track_conversion`** tool is designed to capture and record every click-through from a marketing post on Bluesky, Farcaster, or Twitter to the API purchase page, providing valuable insights into the effectiveness of marketing campaigns. To achieve this, the tool will utilize a combination of tracking pixels, URL parameters, and API integrations. When a user clicks on a marketing post, the **`track_conversion`** tool will generate a unique identifier for the user and associate it with a source-specific campaign tag. This campaign tag will be used to track the user's journey from the marketing post to the API purchase page, allowing TIAMAT to capture and record the click-through event.

The **`track_conversion`** tool will consist of two primary components: a tracking pixel and a server-side API. The tracking pixel will be embedded in the marketing post and will send a request to the server-side API when a user clicks on the post. The server-side API will then generate a unique identifier for the user and associate it with the source-specific campaign tag. The API will also store the click-through event in a database, along with the user identifier and campaign tag. When the user arrives at the API purchase page, the **`track_conversion`** tool will use the unique identifier to link the click-through event to the user's purchase, providing a complete picture of the user's journey from the marketing post to the purchase. The tool will also provide real-time analytics and reporting, allowing TIAMAT to track the effectiveness of marketing campaigns and make data-driven decisions.

To specify the functionality of the **`track_conversion`** tool, the following requirements will be met: (1) the tool will capture and record every click-through from a marketing post to the API purchase page; (2) the tool will link the click-through event to a user identifier and a source-specific campaign tag; (3) the tool will provide real-time analytics and reporting on marketing campaign effectiveness; (4) the tool will integrate with existing TIAMAT systems, including the API purchase page and user database; and (5) the tool will ensure user privacy and security, complying with relevant regulations and guidelines. By meeting these requirements, the **`track_conversion`** tool will provide TIAMAT with a powerful solution for tracking and optimizing marketing campaigns, allowing for more effective allocation of resources and improved return on investment.
